name: environment-switcher
title: Environment Switcher
description: A presentation + control surface for choosing the environment an app targets (dev / staging / production, regions, preview branches). Current-environment trigger opens a searchable, fully keyboard-navigable listbox with per-environment status/health, region/branch/version/last-deploy, disabled reasons, recents + favorites, and optional groups. Production switches are icon + label marked (never color alone) and can be gated behind a confirmation dialog. Controlled value/onValueChange with app-owned switching + error/retry. It never mutates a backend.
